Globally, regional Tx5d values average 0.77°C more than they would have without warming over 1992–2013.

The probability of extreme Tx5d values (the 90th percentile in each region calculated from the counterfactual time series) has also substantially increased, with probabilities rising by 13 p.p. across regions, on average
